metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace (Sentinel workspace).
Azure region of the Log Analytics workspace (example: centralindia).
Parser function name (alias) that will be created in Logs > Functions.
The KQL parser code (function body) to deploy.
Display name shown in Logs > Functions.

variables.query:
fdr_CrowdStrike_Secondary_Data_CL
| extend AF = todynamic(AdditionalFields)
| extend
    EventTime                     = todatetime(AF['_time']),
    EventId                       = tostring(AF['id']),
    EventSimpleName               = tostring(AF['event_simpleName']),
    EventPlatform                 = tostring(AF['event_platform']),
    EventOrigin                   = tostring(AF['EventOrigin']),
    EffectiveTransmissionClass    = tostring(AF['EffectiveTransmissionClass']),
    ProcessName                   = tostring(AF['name']),
    ComputerName                  = tostring(AF['ComputerName']),
    ContextProcessId              = tostring(AF['ContextProcessId']),
    ContextThreadId               = tostring(AF['ContextThreadId']),
    ContextImageFileName          = tostring(AF['ContextImageFileName']),
    TargetProcessId               = tostring(AF['TargetProcessId']),
    ParentProcessId               = tostring(AF['ParentProcessId']),
    GrandparentProcessId          = tostring(AF['GrandparentProcessId']),
    CommandLine                   = tostring(AF['CommandLine']),
    ImageFileName                 = tostring(AF['ImageFileName']),
    ParentCommandLine             = tostring(AF['ParentCommandLine']),
    ParentImageFileName           = tostring(AF['ParentImageFileName']),
    GrandparentCommandLine        = tostring(AF['GrandparentCommandLine']),
    GrandparentImageFileName      = tostring(AF['GrandparentImageFileName']),
    TargetProcessCommandLine      = tostring(AF['TargetProcessCommandLine']),
    TargetProcessImageFileName    = tostring(AF['TargetProcessImageFileName']),
    SHA256Hash                    = tostring(AF['SHA256HashData']),
    ParentSHA256Hash              = tostring(AF['ParentSHA256HashData']),
    GrandParentSHA256Hash         = tostring(AF['GrandparentSHA256HashData']),
    FileSize                      = tolong(AF['Size']),
    ShannonEntropy                = todouble(AF['ShannonEntropy']),
    FileEcpBitmask                = tostring(AF['FileEcpBitmask']),
    TargetFileName                = tostring(AF['TargetFileName']),
    VirtualAddress                = tolong(AF['VirtualAddress']),
    LocalAddressIP4               = tostring(AF['LocalAddressIP4']),
    CurrentLocalIP                = tostring(AF['CurrentLocalIP']),
    Subnet                        = tostring(AF['subnet']),
    LocalIPCount                  = toint(AF['localipCount']),
    AIP                           = tostring(AF['aip']),
    ConfigStateHash               = tostring(AF['ConfigStateHash']),
    ConfigBuild                   = tostring(AF['ConfigBuild']),
    Entitlements                  = tostring(AF['Entitlements']),
    ForceTimestamp                = tostring(AF['ForceTimestamp']),
    PatternId                     = tostring(AF['PatternId']),
    PatternIdList                 = tostring(AF['PatternIdList']),
    ParentProcessPatternIdList    = tostring(AF['ParentProcessPatternIdList']),
    GrandparentProcessPatternIdList = tostring(AF['GrandparentProcessPatternIdList']),
    TemplateInstanceId            = tostring(AF['TemplateInstanceId']),
    TemplateDisposition           = tostring(AF['TemplateDisposition']),
    ContextProcessTags            = tostring(AF['ContextProcessTagsAsString']),
    Tactic                        = tostring(AF['Tactic']),
    Technique                     = tostring(AF['Technique']),
    OciContainerId                = tostring(AF['OciContainerId']),
    IsLateContainerEvent          = tostring(AF['IsLateContainerEvent']),
    BPFCmd                        = tostring(AF['BPFCmd']),
    BPFProgType                   = tostring(AF['BPFProgType']),
    BPFProgAttachBtfId            = tostring(AF['BPFProgAttachBtfId']),
    BPFProgLicense                = tostring(AF['BPFProgLicense']),
    BPFProgName                   = tostring(AF['BPFProgName']),
    ModuleLoadStatus              = tostring(AF['ModuleLoadStatus']),
    CertificateEid                = tostring(AF['eid']),
    CertificateIssuerCN           = tostring(AF['IssuerCN']),
    CertificateCustomerIdString   = tostring(AF['CustomerIdString']),
    CertificateEventType          = tostring(AF['EventType']),
    SubjectCertValidFrom          = todatetime(AF['SubjectCertValidFrom']),
    SubjectCertValidTo            = todatetime(AF['SubjectCertValidTo']),
    SubjectCN                     = tostring(AF['SubjectCN']),
    SubjectDN                     = tostring(AF['SubjectDN']),
    IssuerDN                      = tostring(AF['IssuerDN']),
    SubjectSerialNumber           = tostring(AF['SubjectSerialNumber']),
    SubjectCertThumbprint         = tostring(AF['SubjectCertThumbprint']),
    SHA256CertHash                = tostring(AF['SHA256HashData']),
    AuthenticodeHashData          = tostring(AF['AuthenticodeHashData']),
    SubjectKeyIdentifier          = tostring(AF['SubjectKeyIdentifier']),
    AuthorityKeyIdentifier        = tostring(AF['AuthorityKeyIdentifier']),
    SignatureDigestAlg            = tostring(AF['SignatureDigestAlg']),
    SignatureDigestEncryptAlg     = tostring(AF['SignatureDigestEncryptAlg']),
    ExternalApiType               = tostring(AF['ExternalApiType']),
    AgentIdString                 = tostring(AF['AgentIdString']),
    CID                           = tostring(AF['cid']),
    Nonce                         = tostring(AF['Nonce']),
    SignInfoFlagHasValidSignature = iff(tostring(AF['SignInfoFlagHasValidSignature']) == "true", true, false),
    SignInfoFlagInvalidSignChain  = iff(tostring(AF['SignInfoFlagInvalidSignChain']) == "true", true, false),
    SignInfoFlagMicrosoftSigned   = iff(tostring(AF['SignInfoFlagMicrosoftSigned']) == "true", true, false),
    SignInfoFlagEmbeddedSigned    = iff(tostring(AF['SignInfoFlagEmbeddedSigned']) == "true", true, false),
    SignInfoFlagCatalogSigned     = iff(tostring(AF['SignInfoFlagCatalogSigned']) == "true", true, false),
    SignInfoFlagThirdPartyRoot    = iff(tostring(AF['SignInfoFlagThirdPartyRoot']) == "true", true, false),
    SignInfoFlagNoEmbeddedCert    = iff(tostring(AF['SignInfoFlagNoEmbeddedCert']) == "true", true, false),
    RegObjectName                 = tostring(AF['RegObjectName']),
    RegClassificationFlags        = tostring(AF['RegClassificationFlags']),
    RegOperationType              = tostring(AF['RegOperationType']),
    RegStringValue                = tostring(AF['RegStringValue']),
    RegType                       = tostring(AF['RegType']),
    RegClassificationIndex        = tostring(AF['RegClassificationIndex']),
    RegValueName                  = tostring(AF['RegValueName']),
    AuthenticationId              = tostring(AF['AuthenticationId']),
    TokenType                     = tostring(AF['TokenType']),
    RegBinaryValue                = tostring(AF['RegBinaryValue']),
    AID                           = tostring(AF['aid'])

tags.name: Purpose
tags.value: Normalize CrowdStrike device inventory for analytics and reporting

tags.name: Scope
tags.value: Covers device asset records from CrowdstrikeRawEvent; excludes detections/alerts
